'''Zuud''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] with the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] attached to the [[Analysis Bureau (Imperial Intelligence)|Analysis Bureau]] of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]]. Zuud was one of the Empire's most effective interrogators. She loved to torture prisoners to get the information that she wanted, and was known for her ability to instantly determine a prisoner's limits.

==Biography==
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Zuud was assigned to the Imperial base on [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist VI]].

Charged with the interrogation and torture of Rebel agent [[Jorin Sol]], Lieutenant Zuud used a scan grid to interrogate Sol. Lieutenant Zuud performed the interrogation with such enthusiasm and zeal that would plague the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] far more than what an ordinary breaking would have done. Although she was joined in the [[Torture/Legends|torture]] sessions by another Intelligence officer with the rank of [[Captain/Legends|captain]], he appeared to defer to her judgment.
